title: Dinosaur Notebook – A5 / 21cm x 15cm / Wirebound/Lined and Plain / 100 pages/Childrens Notepad/Kids Notebook/Boys or girls Sketchbook/Mens journal/Dinosaur Inspired/Dinosaur Gift
features: PREMIUM DINOSAUR DESIGN NOTEBOOK - Brought to you by Printykins UK, this modern Dinosaur inspired notebook is far from prehistoric, an ideal choice for all your everyday writing needs. With an eye catching design this notepad is sure to brighten up all Dinosaur lovers desks!

WHAT MAKES THIS NOTEBOOK SO GREAT & UNIQUE - Due to the geo star Dinosaur themed background not only would this Notebook be a great gift for a boys or girls birthday / child’s stocking filler, the notebook would be a most welcome gift for all Dinosaur enthusiasts alike.
MULTI USE – With both plain and lined / ruled pages this jotta can be used as both a sketchbook and notebook.
SIZE – The notebook is A5 / 21cm x 15cm size which makes this pad ideal to carry around with you in your bag, yet large enough to list even the largest of family’s food shopping lists 😊

OTHER DETAILS – The notebook is presented on high quality paper (90GSM stock paper) enabling writing / sketching on both sides, bound with a silver sturdy spiral, this notepad has a tough and long-lasting feel.
